title: Ant Control Longwood Bronx NYC | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional ant control in Longwood, Bronx. Effective ant extermination for homes & businesses near Southern Boulevard. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Longwood residents facing ant infestations can rely on Best Pest Control NYC for fast, effective solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique pest challenges in this vibrant Bronx neighborhood, from pre-war apartment buildings to local businesses along Prospect Avenue. We provide comprehensive ant control services starting at $350-$550, with same-day appointments available.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Longwood and the greater Bronx area. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly treatments that are safe for families and pets while delivering guaranteed results that keep ants from returning.
localContext: Longwood's mix of historic multi-family buildings, commercial corridors like Southern Boulevard, and proximity to parks like St. Mary's creates ideal conditions for ant colonies to thrive. The neighborhood's dense residential areas and older building infrastructure often provide multiple entry points that require professional expertise to properly seal and treat.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide ant control service in Longwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Longwood residents. Our team understands that ant infestations require immediate attention, especially in multi-unit buildings where colonies can spread quickly between apartments.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Longwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Longwood residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in older buildings as they can damage wooden structures. Our inspection identifies the species and targets treatment accordingly.

faqs.question: Is your ant control treatment safe for apartments and families?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are trained in low-toxicity application methods ideal for Longwood's densely populated residential buildings, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry times.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 ant control service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, interior and exterior treatment, nest elimination, and a 30-day warranty. The price varies based on property size, infestation severity, and building type. We provide free quotes and can adjust treatment plans for multi-unit buildings.
